series_metadata.series_description: Monthly and quarterly reports and records of ceiling allocations, revisions, advances, worksheets, and related documentation of ODHS administered state and federal funds allocated to an expended by county departments of human services.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years. ; Paper: Retain 2 years in office, then microfilm key material including quarterly summaries and side schedules. Destroy paper after microfilm is verified ; Microform: Retain in office 10 years or until federal and state audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved. Duplicate set of microfilm to be stored at State Records Center and destroyed as above, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Erase
